mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS RESULT FROM MEMBER WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED'
AND TO_DATE(LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < SYSDATE - 30
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE email = #{email} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT t.TRIP_ID as tripId, t.NAME as name, t.STATUS as status, t.START_DATE as startDate, t.END_DATE as endDate, t.LATEST_DATE as latestDate,
CASE WHEN t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE' THEN COUNT(DISTINCT ts.TRIP_SCHEDULE_ID) ELSE 0 END as scheduleCount,
CASE WHEN t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE' THEN COUNT(DISTINCT b.BOOKMARK_ID) ELSE 0 END as bookmarkCount,
30 - (SYSDATE - TO_DATE(t.LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) as remainDate
FROM TRIP t
LEFT JOIN TRIP_DAY td ON t.TRIP_ID = td.TRIP_ID
LEFT JOIN TRIP_SCHEDULE ts ON td.TRIP_DAY_ID = ts.TRIP_DAY_ID
LEFT JOIN bookmark b ON t.TRIP_ID = b.TRIP_ID
WHERE t.Member_ID = #{memberId} AND t.STATUS = 'INACTIVE'
GROUP BY t.TRIP_ID, t.NAME, t.STATUS, t.START_DATE, t.END_DATE, t.LATEST_DATE
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TRIP WHERE STATUS = 'INACTIVE'
AND TO_DATE(LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < SYSDATE - 30
